asymmetry: The UK ISA allowance — £20,000 tax-free — permanently expires April 5. Every pound not sheltered inside an ISA this tax year is gone from the wrapper forever. HMRC does not carry unused allowance forward. Banks do not remind you. The deadline is in 14 days. This is not manufactured urgency — it is statute.

script.intrusion: Every pound you didn't put in an ISA this year is gone permanently.
script.weight: The annual ISA allowance is £20,000. If you don't use it by April 5th, that tax-free capacity is gone permanently — not carried forward, not recovered. HMRC does not send a reminder.
script.mechanism: HMRC created the ISA wrapper in 1999. Each April 5th, any unused allowance disappears — permanently. It does not roll over. The wrapper itself protects every pound inside it from income tax and capital gains tax for life. But HMRC does not remind you. Your bank does not remind you. The deadline is structural. The silence around it is deliberate.
script.proof: HMRC's ISA statistics, published annually, show £3.7 billion in unclaimed ISA allowance in the 2022-23 tax year. That is permanent, irrecoverable tax
script.comment_trigger: How much of your £20,000 ISA allowance have you used this year?
script.move: What financially-aware people use to navigate this is Fidelity Stocks & Shares

visual_direction.frame_description: Extreme close-up of a bank statement, numbers slightly out of focus, single column of figures barely visible
visual_direction.light_source: Single overhead fluorescent tube, directly above, casting sharp downward shadows
visual_direction.motion: Ken Burns: slow pull back from 120% to 100%, revealing more of the document, 75 seconds duration
visual_direction.kling_prompt: extreme close-up bank statement paper texture, cold fluorescent overhead light, sharp downward shadows, numbers barely legible, cinematic 9:16 vertical, dark atmosphere, documentary realism, no faces, no people
visual_direction.negative_prompt: faces, people, warm colours, sunlight, lifestyle imagery, text overlays, happy, bright, colorful, outdoors

shot_list.intent: Stop the scroll. Establish tension before explanation.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 1 (0–5s): Aesthetic: Lo-fi Authentic. real domestic environments: kitchens, bedrooms, living rooms, commutes — the ordinary world as protagonist. Empty office desk. Untouched ISA paperwork sits under a paperweight. A phone screen lights up — notification unseen. Camera: iPhone 15 Pro Max or similar consumer device, natural lens, no stabilisation, real compression. Motion: handheld human breath visible, zoom instead of dolly, accidental reframes kept. Lighting: window light at noon or lamp from wrong angle — imperfect, real, what was there. screen glow as fill — the device used to access information. Film stock: compressed video codec — slight purple fringing, real exposure decisions, no grade applied. Atmosphere: warm practical light flickers once at 2 seconds — power-grid suggestion — then stabilises. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] ambient light character + room environment + human-held movement energy. compressed video codec — slight purple fringing, real exposure decisions, no grade applied. Temporal consistency across all clips. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: studio, professional lighting, crisp production value, cinematic grading, cinematic lenses.
